name: Eric Bye
role: Managing Director and AI Transformation Expert
quote: NN1 has built an incredibly community at the perfect time. The effort that goes into events has made for great experiences, and the work they do to highlight and support their members and the local area goes even further. Whether you're tech curious, or passionate about the details, it's an inviting and supportive group, and would recommend attending one of their events and supporting to anyone!
